case_title: SAM'S MANAGEMNET CO., L.P. VS. NEW COLLEGE OF CALIFORNIA

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: ZANGHI, JOHN P SUBSTITUTED FOR GAMINO, GUADALUPE AS ATTORNEY FOR SAM'S MANAGEMNET CO., L.P.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAM'S MANAGEMNET CO., L.P. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NEW COLLEGE OF CALIFORNIA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 3125 16TH STREET, SF, 94110 $13,441.50 RENT, $750.00 ATTORNEYS FEES AND COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $14,191.50, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED "JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO STIPULATION"
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT NEW COLLEGE OF CALIFORNIA
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - COMMERCIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAM'S MANAGEMNET CO., L.P. AS TO DEFENDANT NEW COLLEGE OF CALIFORNIA SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
DEMAND FOR JURY FILED BY DEFENDANT NEW COLLEGE OF CALIFORNIA
ORDER ENTERING JUDGMENT FOR UNLAWFUL DETAINER PURSUANT TO TERMS OF SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT [CCP SECTION 664.6]
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $99.56 FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAM'S MANAGEMNET CO., L.P.
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT NEW COLLEGE OF CALIFORNIA
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER TO ENTER JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO STIPULATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAM'S MANAGEMNET CO., L.P.
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT NEW COLLEGE OF CALIFORNIA
